birthday.title: 🎂 Birthday
birthday.set_success: Your birthday has been set to **{day}/{month}**! 🎉
birthday.not_set_self: You haven't set your birthday yet! Use `/birthday set` to set it.

counting.not_set: Counting game is not set up on this server.
counting.admin_only: You must be an administrator to configure this.
counting.err_perms: I don't have permission to write or read messages in <#{channel}>!
counting.ruined_double: <@!{user}> ruined the count by counting twice in a row! The count has been reset to **0**.
counting.ruined_wrong: <@!{user}> ruined the count by typing **{wrong}** instead of **{expected}**! The count has been reset to **0**.
counting.highscore_announce: 🎉 **New Server Highscore!** You reached **{highscore}**! Keep going!

voice.limit_changed: Your channel user limit has been set to **{limit}**!

ban/unban.edesc1: The action for <@!{target}> can't be processed because the bot is lacking permissions

ban/unban.bandesc: Are you sure you want to ban <@!{target}>?
ban/unban.canceled2: The process has been cancelled because this menu expired

t-setup.err_no_channel: Target channel not found or not configured!
t-setup.err_no_category: Category not found! Please create it first.

t-setup.err_max_roles: You can add a maximum of 5 support roles!
t-setup.warning_limit: ⚠️ **Note:** Because your server has more than 75 assignable roles, the remaining roles have been cut off (Discord allows a maximum of 5 rows of menus/buttons).

role-setup.first_layer_desc:
>>> Use the selection menus below to manage your Role Panels
Note: You have 90 seconds for interaction before timeout

role-setup.panel_desc: Click the buttons below to assign or remove roles!

role-setup.err_max_roles: You can add a maximum of 5 roles to a single panel!
role-setup.warning_limit: ⚠️ **Note:** Because your server has more than 75 assignable roles, the remaining roles have been cut off (Discord allows a maximum of 5 rows of menus/buttons).
role-setup.not_found: This role no longer exists on this server.

role-setup.added: Role **{roleName}** has been successfully assigned to you.
role-setup.removed: Role **{roleName}** has been successfully removed from you.
role-setup.error: An error occurred while modifying your roles.

truth_questions: Have you ever lied to your best friend?
What is the most embarrassing thing you've ever done?
What is the worst gift you have ever received?
Have you ever cheated on a test?
What is the strangest dream you've ever had?
dare_prompts: Sing a song of the group's choice out loud!
Send a funny selfie in this channel!
Speak in an accent chosen by the server for the next 5 minutes!
Tell a really bad dad joke out loud or in chat!
Eat a spoonful of hot sauce or mustard!
Text your crush and tell them a joke!
Show the last photo in your phone's gallery!
